description_long: This house features a symmetrical brick facade with white trim and a central arched entryway, flanked by large rectangular windows. The structure is surrounded by a manicured lawn and includes a fenced backyard with mature trees and shrubbery. The roof is primarily flat with some stepped and terraced sections, and there are multiple outdoor spaces, including a raised deck and a patio area. The windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance. The main entrance is accessed via a straight walkway leading to a prominent arched doorway, which is accentuated by a small overhang. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and early 20th-century suburban architectural influences.
description: A symmetrical brick house with white trim, flat and terraced roof sections, and a central arched entryway, surrounded by a manicured lawn and fenced backyard. Features include symmetrical window rows, mature trees, and multiple outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central arched entryway, symmetrical windows, and a fenced backyard with trees on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the brick gable end, and the walkway extending from both sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the raised deck, patio area, and more of the fenced backyard with additional greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, trees, and the rear gable end with symmetrical window placement.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway with a straight walkway, small overhang, and white trim
